pattern_en: One of the best experiences I've had was ~
meaning: 제가 겪었던 최고의 경험 중 하나는 ~였어요.

examples.en: One of the best experiences I've had was volunteering abroad.
examples.ko: 제가 겪었던 최고의 경험 중 하나는 해외 봉사였어요.

examples.en: One of the best experiences I've had was learning to surf.
examples.ko: 제가 겪었던 최고의 경험 중 하나는 서핑을 배운 것이었어요.

pattern_en: I had a memorable experience when ~

examples.en: I had a memorable experience when I met my childhood hero.
examples.ko: 어릴 적 우상을 만났을 때 기억에 남는 경험을 했어요.

examples.en: I had a memorable experience when our team won the finals.
examples.ko: 우리 팀이 결승에서 이겼을 때 기억에 남는 경험을 했어요.

pattern_en: It turned out to be a great experience because ~

examples.en: It turned out to be a great experience because everyone was so welcoming.
examples.ko: 모두가 환영해 줘서 정말 좋은 경험이 됐어요.

examples.en: It turned out to be a great experience because I pushed myself out of my comfort zone.
examples.ko: 안전지대를 벗어나 도전해서 정말 좋은 경험이 됐어요.

pattern_en: I'll never forget the time I ~

examples.en: I'll never forget the time I saw the northern lights.
examples.ko: 오로라를 봤던 그때를 잊을 수 없어요.

examples.en: I'll never forget the time I performed on stage.
examples.ko: 무대에 섰던 그때를 잊을 수 없어요.

pattern_en: I ran into a problem when ~

examples.en: I ran into a problem when my flight was cancelled.
examples.ko: 비행기가 취소됐을 때 문제가 생겼어요.

examples.en: I ran into a problem when I lost my wallet on the subway.
examples.ko: 지하철에서 지갑을 잃어버렸을 때 문제가 생겼어요.

pattern_en: Things didn't go as planned because ~

examples.en: Things didn't go as planned because the weather turned bad.
examples.ko: 날씨가 갑자기 나빠져서 계획대로 되지 않았어요.

examples.en: Things didn't go as planned because we underestimated the traffic.
examples.ko: 교통 체증을 과소평가해서 계획대로 되지 않았어요.

pattern_en: I made a mistake by ~ing

examples.en: I made a mistake by not double-checking the address.
examples.ko: 주소를 다시 확인하지 않아서 실수를 했어요.

examples.en: I made a mistake by leaving too late.
examples.ko: 너무 늦게 나와서 실수를 했어요.

pattern_en: Looking back, I should have ~

examples.en: Looking back, I should have asked for help sooner.
examples.ko: 돌이켜 보면 더 일찍 도움을 요청했어야 했어요.

examples.en: Looking back, I should have saved more money in advance.
examples.ko: 돌이켜 보면 미리 돈을 더 아껴뒀어야 했어요.

pattern_en: Last summer, I went on a trip where ~

examples.en: Last summer, I went on a trip where I hiked every day.
examples.ko: 지난여름 매일 하이킹을 한 여행을 다녀왔어요.

examples.en: Last summer, I went on a trip where I tried local street food.
examples.ko: 지난여름 길거리 음식을 맛본 여행을 다녀왔어요.

pattern_en: During a festival, I ~

examples.en: During a festival, I got lost in the crowd but found new friends.
examples.ko: 축제 때 사람들 속에서 길을 잃었지만 새 친구를 만났어요.

examples.en: During a festival, I tried on traditional clothes for fun.
examples.ko: 축제 때 재미로 전통 옷을 입어 봤어요.

pattern_en: At the wedding, I ~

examples.en: At the wedding, I gave a short speech in English.
examples.ko: 결혼식에서 영어로 짧게 축사를 했어요.

examples.en: At the wedding, I danced with people I'd just met.
examples.ko: 결혼식에서 막 만난 사람들과 춤을 췄어요.

pattern_en: On the way to the airport, I ~

examples.en: On the way to the airport, I realized I'd forgotten my passport.
examples.ko: 공항 가는 길에 여권을 두고 온 걸 알았어요.

examples.en: On the way to the airport, I grabbed a quick coffee with a friend.
examples.ko: 공항 가는 길에 친구랑 급하게 커피 한 잔했어요.

pattern_en: At first, I felt nervous, but later ~

examples.en: At first, I felt nervous, but later I relaxed and enjoyed the talk.
examples.ko: 처음엔 긴장됐는데, 나중에는 편해져서 이야기를 즐겼어요.

examples.en: At first, I felt nervous, but later I was proud I tried.
examples.ko: 처음엔 긴장됐는데, 나중에는 도전해서 뿌듯했어요.

pattern_en: I ended up feeling much better after ~

examples.en: I ended up feeling much better after talking it through.
examples.ko: 이야기를 나눈 뒤에 훨씬 나아진 기분이었어요.

examples.en: I ended up feeling much better after taking a short walk.
examples.ko: 짧게 산책한 뒤에 훨씬 나아진 기분이었어요.

pattern_en: I was worried at first, but in the end ~

examples.en: I was worried at first, but in the end everything worked out.
examples.ko: 처음엔 걱정됐는데 결국 다 잘 풀렸어요.

examples.en: I was worried at first, but in the end the team supported me.
examples.ko: 처음엔 걱정됐는데 결국 팀이 저를 도와줬어요.

pattern_en: My mood completely changed when ~

examples.en: My mood completely changed when I heard the good news.
examples.ko: 좋은 소식을 들었을 때 기분이 완전히 바뀌었어요.

examples.en: My mood completely changed when we reached the summit.
examples.ko: 정상에 올랐을 때 기분이 완전히 바뀌었어요.

pattern_en: What stood out the most was ~

examples.en: What stood out the most was how kind the locals were.
examples.ko: 가장 인상 깊었던 건 현지인들이 얼마나 친절했는지였어요.

examples.en: What stood out the most was the silence in the mountains.
examples.ko: 가장 인상 깊었던 건 산속의 고요였어요.

pattern_en: One thing I clearly remember is ~

examples.en: One thing I clearly remember is the smell of the sea.
examples.ko: 분명히 기억나는 한 가지는 바다 냄새예요.

examples.en: One thing I clearly remember is how loud the crowd cheered.
examples.ko: 분명히 기억나는 한 가지는 함성이 얼마나 컸는지예요.

pattern_en: I'll always associate that trip with ~

examples.en: I'll always associate that trip with rainy afternoons.
examples.ko: 그 여행이면 항상 비 오는 오후가 떠올라요.

examples.en: I'll always associate that trip with trying spicy food for the first time.
examples.ko: 그 여행이면 항상 처음으로 매운 음식을 먹었던 게 떠올라요.

pattern_en: The moment that stuck with me was when ~

examples.en: The moment that stuck with me was when the sun rose over the lake.
examples.ko: 기억에 남는 순간은 해가 호수 위로 떠올랐을 때였어요.

examples.en: The moment that stuck with me was when my friend surprised me.
examples.ko: 기억에 남는 순간은 친구가 깜짝 놀라게 했을 때였어요.

pattern_en: Something unexpected happened when ~

examples.en: Something unexpected happened when our guide suddenly changed the route.
examples.ko: 가이드가 갑자기 코스를 바꿨을 때 뜻밖의 일이 있었어요.

examples.en: Something unexpected happened when we bumped into a celebrity.
examples.ko: 연예인을 우연히 만났을 때 뜻밖의 일이 있었어요.

pattern_en: I didn't expect ~ at all

examples.en: I didn't expect the concert to be that crowded.
examples.ko: 콘서트가 그렇게 붐빌 줄 전혀 몰랐어요.

examples.en: I didn't expect the interview to be so short.
examples.ko: 면접이 그렇게 짧을 줄 전혀 몰랐어요.

pattern_en: Out of nowhere, ~

examples.en: Out of nowhere, it started pouring rain.
examples.ko: 갑자기 비가 억수같이 쏟아졌어요.

examples.en: Out of nowhere, my phone battery died.
examples.ko: 갑자기 휴대폰 배터리가 나갔어요.

pattern_en: Little did I know that ~

examples.en: Little did I know that the ticket would sell out so fast.
examples.ko: 표가 그렇게 빨리 매진될 줄은 꿈에도 몰랐어요.

examples.en: Little did I know that I'd get the job offer.
examples.ko: 채용 제의를 받을 줄은 꿈에도 몰랐어요.

pattern_en: What I learned from that experience was ~

examples.en: What I learned from that experience was to stay calm under pressure.
examples.ko: 그 경험에서 배운 건 압박 속에서도 침착하라는 거였어요.

examples.en: What I learned from that experience was to ask more questions.
examples.ko: 그 경험에서 배운 건 더 많이 물어보라는 거였어요.

pattern_en: That experience taught me to ~

examples.en: That experience taught me to pack lighter.
examples.ko: 그 경험 덕분에 짐을 더 가볍게 싸게 됐어요.

examples.en: That experience taught me to double-check reservations.
examples.ko: 그 경험 덕분에 예약을 두 번 확인하게 됐어요.

pattern_en: If I could do it again, I would ~

examples.en: If I could do it again, I would leave earlier.
examples.ko: 다시 한다면 더 일찍 나갈 거예요.

examples.en: If I could do it again, I would take more photos.
examples.ko: 다시 한다면 사진을 더 많이 찍을 거예요.

pattern_en: The biggest takeaway was ~

examples.en: The biggest takeaway was that teamwork matters.
examples.ko: 가장 큰 깨달음은 팀워크가 중요하다는 거였어요.

examples.en: The biggest takeaway was to trust the process.
examples.ko: 가장 큰 깨달음은 과정을 믿으라는 거였어요.

pattern_en: It was the first time in a long while that I ~

examples.en: It was the first time in a long while that I visited my hometown.
examples.ko: 오랜만에 고향에 다녀왔어요.

examples.en: It was the first time in a long while that I rode a bike outdoors.
examples.ko: 오랜만에 밖에서 자전거를 탔어요.

pattern_en: After a long break, I ~

examples.en: After a long break, I started studying English again.
examples.ko: 오랜 공백 뒤에 영어 공부를 다시 시작했어요.

examples.en: After a long break, I met my old classmates.
examples.ko: 오랜 공백 뒤에 옛 동창들을 만났어요.

pattern_en: I hadn't ~ in ages, but one day I ~

examples.en: I hadn't gone camping in ages, but one day I joined a trip.
examples.ko: 오랫동안 캠핑을 안 했는데, 어느 날 여행에 참여했어요.

examples.en: I hadn't sung in public in ages, but one day I tried karaoke.
examples.ko: 오랫동안 공개적으로 노래를 안 했는데, 어느 날 노래방에서 불렀어요.

pattern_en: Reconnecting with ~ felt ~

examples.en: Reconnecting with an old friend felt surprisingly natural.
examples.ko: 옛 친구와 다시 연락하니 의외로 자연스러운 느낌이었어요.

examples.en: Reconnecting with my mentor felt encouraging.
examples.ko: 멘토와 다시 연락하니 힘이 나는 느낌이었어요.
